default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Juan to two new GrowthX projects.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Projects:** Juan will write copy for two internal GrowthX projects: the time-sensitive `AI-led growth` site and the polished `growthx.ai` website.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Urgent Priority:** The `AI-led growth` site is the top priority, with copy needed by EOW for a weekend build to support a live webinar next week.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Communication:** Juan will receive a Slack invite to enable direct communication, replacing email for faster feedback and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Resources:** Renato will provide a Figma prototype and a formal brief for the `AI-led growth` site; existing brand guidelines are available for both projects.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

## Topics

### Project 1: AI-led growth Website (High Priority)

  - [**Goal:** Create a new website for the `AI-led growth` community to support a live webinar next week.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Copy needed by EOW for a weekend build.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Scope:** 4–6 pages, including:](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**GrowthOS:** The premium €12k/yr bundle (custom sprint, CheckDat SaaS, community access).](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [**Membership:** Base community access, proposed price change from free → $100/yr.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Masterclass:** Webinar page with a countdown timer to create FOMO.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**CMO Executive Council:** Page to feature partners and guest speakers.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [**Deliverable:** A narrative-driven copy pass to connect all pages and guide the visitor journey.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

### Project 2: growthx.ai Website (Lower Priority)

  - [**Goal:** Write copy for the polished version of the new `growthx.ai` website.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Flexible, as the site will be built over the next two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Scope:** A general copy pass to refine the narrative and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Deliverable:** A copy pass with creative suggestions for tone and detail.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [**Time Estimate:** \~2–4 hours.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

### Resources & Communication

  - [**Brand Guidelines:** Renato shared the existing brand guidelines, which include tone of voice and personality details.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [**Slack Invitation:** Juan will receive a Slack invite to enable direct communication with Renato, streamlining the feedback loop.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)

### Previous Project: Search Client

  - [**Status:** The project is on hold due to internal client issues.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**Action:** Juan's notes for other pages are parked; no further work is needed at this time.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Renato:**](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Refine the `AI-led growth` Figma prototype.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [Send the formal brief for the `AI-led growth` site.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
      - [Send the Slack invite to Juan (`juan@juanbuys.com`, +31 6 22347382).](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [**Juan:**](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Prioritize copy for the `AI-led growth` site, targeting completion by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Complete the copy pass for the `growthx.ai` site within the 2–4 hour estimate.](https://fathom.video/share/eKqa4QxRmhXs9KLUAPgzRciWWzMQ59se?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

action_items.description: Finalize AI-led growth prototype; send Figma link + brief to Juan
Invite Juan to GrowthX Figma; Juan to review 2–4h
Send Slack invite to Juan (jo@juanbuys.com); add to relevant channel
